title: Ramiro Valdés Menéndez, Architect of Cuba’s Surveillance State, Dies at 94
summary_full: Considered the country’s most powerful leader after the Castro brothers, he was the first director of the Interior Ministry, keeping a close eye on dissent.
summary_public: Considered the country’s most powerful leader after the Castro brothers, he was the first director of the Interior Ministry, keeping a close eye on dissent.
